mapper.sql: n.seq, b.branch_name AS branchName, n.title, n.category, n.is_pinned AS isPinned, n.view_count AS viewCount, COALESCE(n.created_by, '관리자') AS createdBy, n.created_date AS createdDate, n.event_start_date AS eventStartDate, n.event_end_date AS eventEndDate
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM notices n LEFT JOIN branches b ON n.branch_seq = b.seq
ORDER BY n.is_pinned DESC, n.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM notices n LEFT JOIN branches b ON n.branch_seq = b.seq
ORDER BY n.is_pinned DESC, n.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
